Rancher.title: Rancher Profile
Rancher.description: The profile of the rancher managing the herd.

uid.description: The unique ID of the rancher.

email.description: The email address of the rancher.

Animal.title: Animal Record
Animal.description: A continuous biological record of an individual animal.

id.description: The unique ID of the animal (e.g., ear tag).

rancherUid.description: The UID of the rancher who owns the animal.

name.description: The name or nickname of the animal.

birthDate.description: The birth date of the animal.

lastUpdate.description: The last time the data was updated.

HealthEvent.title: Health Event
HealthEvent.description: A specific biological event or anomaly detected by the MII.

animalId.description: The ID of the animal involved.

type.description: The type of event (e.g., Respiratory, Estrus, Heat Stress).

description.description: A detailed description of the anomaly.

DataRevenue.title: Data Revenue Record
DataRevenue.description: A record of revenue generated from licensing animal data.

rancherUid.description: The UID of the rancher receiving the revenue.

source.description: The source of the revenue (e.g., Pharma, Insurance).

NDA.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
NDA.description: A record of a signed NDA for access to confidential investor materials.

uid.description: The UID of the user who signed.

fullName.description: The full name of the signer.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the signer (optional).
